name: Pendulum-support bracket (right)
notes: Mirror of piece 18 — pinches the pendulum blade (piece 72) between itself and piece 18, per §II.C. Plain a/b/d tab labels on this piece are receivers; their counterparts live on pieces 27, 28 (plate C) and possibly the blade. Connections to be wired during M2's cross-plate sidecar pass.
